name: Baked Spicy Pineapple Balinese Chicken
recipeInstructions:
~~Spicy Pinapple Sauce~~
1 tablespoon oil
1 Medium red onion, chopped
1 clove garlic, finely chopped
1/4 cup rice wine vinegar
1 can (8 ounces) crushed pineapple in juice
1/4 teaspoon ground allspice
1/4 teaspoon crushed red-pepper flakes
2 1/2 teaspoons dijon mustard
2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh basil
1/4 cup sweet red peppers
1. Coat a 11x7x2-inch baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Flatten chicken between 2 sheets of plastic wrap to uniform thickness.
3. Brush both sides with mustard.
4. Dredge in crumbs, coating both sides.
5. Place in prepared baking dish and refrigerate for 20 minutes to firm the coating.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F.
7. Bake chicken, uncovered, for 20 minutes or until no longer pink in the center.
8. Prepare sauce: Heat oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté for 2 minutes.
9. Mix in vinegar, crushed pineapple, allspice, red-pepper flakes, and mustard. Cook, stirring, for 4 minutes or until bubbly and slightly thickened.
10. Scrape mixture into blender or food processor and whirl until smooth puree.
11. Pour back into skillet and keep warm.
12. Serve by stirring basil and sweet red pepper into sauce. Spoon sauce over chicken on each of 4 plates.
